results.title: Shaibu seeks stronger public-private partnership to revive Nigeria’s sports sector
results.description: The Director General and Chief Executive Officer of the National Institute for Sports (NIS), Philip Shaibu, has called for stronger collaboration between the public and private sectors as part of efforts to reposition Nigeria’s sports industry as a major driver of economic growth, employment generation and national development. Shaibu made the call while speaking on [...]
